Category: Equity — Thematic

Risk classification: Very High
Lock-in: No lock-in period.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: expense_ratio

Historic expense data is available on the scheme page.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: exit_load
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 year.
Historic exit load rules may apply for older investments.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: minimum_investment
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Minimum SIP: ₹100
Minimum lumpsum investment: ₹100
Additional investment (minimum): ₹100
SIP multiplier: ₹1
Maximum SIP: ₹5000

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: benchmark
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Benchmark: Nifty India Defence TRI
Full name: Nifty India Defence Total Return Index

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: tax
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Stamp duty: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
Equity mutual funds: STCG tax applies on units held ≤12 months; LTCG tax applies on gains above exemption limit for units held >12 months. Debt fund taxation varies by holding period and acquisition date. Refer to the scheme page and latest tax rules for exact rates.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: fund_management
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Priya Ranjan — Fund Manager, since Apr 2025
Education: Mr. Ranjan is B.E(Computer Science) and PGDBM (Finance).
Experience: He has over 14 years of experience in equity research.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: fund_management
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Dhruv Muchhal — Fund Manager, since Jun 2023
Education: Mr. Dhruv has done B.Com, CA and CFA
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC MF,he has worked with Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd., Goldman Sachs, CRISIL Global Research & Analytics and Deloitte Haskins & Sells

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: fund_management
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Rahul Baijal — Fund Manager, since Apr 2025
Education: Mr. Baijal has done PGDM(MBA) from IIM Calcutta and is an engineering graduate of Delhi college of Engineering
Experience: Prior to joining HDFC Mutual Fund, he has worked with Sundaram Mutual Fund, Bharti AXA Life Insurance, TVF Capital, HSBC Securities, Credit Suisse Securities & Standard Chartered Bank.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: investment_objective
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in equity and equity related securities of Defence & allied sector companies.

Scheme: HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth
Section: fund_house
Source: https://groww.in/mutual-funds/hdfc-defence-fund-direct-growth

Fund house: HDFC Mutual Fund
Registrar: Cams
Address: "HDFC House", 2nd Floor, H. T. Parekh Marg, 165-166, BackbayReclamation, Churchgate Mumbai 400020
Phone: 022 – 66316333
Email: shareholders.relations@hdfcfund.com
AMC launch date: Dec 1999
About AMC: HDFC Mutual Fund started their mutual fund on 30/06/2000 and its managing total assets of ₹2,70,046 Cr. Its ranked at 2 as per total assets at end of 30th Sep 2017.
